title: Retrieve and Use Mass Spectrometry Data from MassIVE
text: Spectra package provides central infrastructure handling Mass Spectrometry (MS) data Bioconductor. package supports interchangeable use different backends import represent MS data variety sources data formats. MsBackendMassIVE package allows retrieve MS data files directly MassIVE (Mass Spectrometry Interactive Virtual Environment) repository. MassIVE community resource developed NIH-funded Center Computational Mass Spectrometry UC San Diego promote global, free exchange mass spectrometry data. MassIVE supports deposition proteomics metabolomics experiments full member ProteomeXchange consortium. MsBackendMassIVE package downloads locally caches MS data files MassIVE data set enables analyses data directly R.

title: Retrieve and Use Mass Spectrometry Data from MassIVE
text: package can installed within R commands :

title: Retrieve and Use Mass Spectrometry Data from MassIVE
text: experiment MassIVE identified unique accession starting MSV followed number. MS data files dataset listed GNPS2 database can downloaded MassIVE’s FTP server. list files MassIVE data set ID MSV000080547. files accessible FTP path associated MassIVE data set. use massive_ftp_path() function return FTP path test data set. MS data files supported formats (mzML, CDF, mzXML) can directly loaded using MsBackendMassIVE backend R Spectra object (MsBackendMassIVE directly extends Spectra’s MsBackendMzR backend therefore supports import MS data files mzML, CDF mzXML formats). default, MS data files data set retrieved, example restrict data files reduce amount data needs downloaded. end define pattern matching file name data files using filePattern parameter. call downloaded files local cache loaded Spectra object. downloading caching data handled Bioconductor’s BiocFileCache. local cache can thus managed directly using functionality package. subsequent loading data files load locally cached versions avoiding thus repetitive download data. Spectra object MS data files MassIVE data set enables now subsequent analysis data R. top spectra variables mass peak data values provided MS data files also additional information related MassIVE data set available specific spectra variables. list available spectra variables data set . MassIVE-specific variables "massive_id" "data_file" providing MassIVE ID data set original data file name MassIVE FTP server individual spectrum. massive_sync() function can used synchronize local content MsBackendMassIVE. function checks data files backend available locally eventually downloads caches missing files. Also, possible manually cache download data files MassIVE using massive_sync_data_files() function. function evaluates respective data files already cached , , download . use retrieve local storage information one data files MassIVE data set MSV000080547: massive_cached_data_files() function can used inspect list locally cached MassIVE data files. function require active internet connection since local content queried. default settings, data.frame available data files returned. Locally cached files MassIVE data set can removed using massive_delete_cache() function providing ID MassIVE data set local data files removed.
code: library(MsBackendMassIVE) ## Registered S3 method overwritten by 'bit64': ##   method          from  ##   print.bitstring tools #' List files of a MassIVE data set all_files <- massive_list_files("MSV000080547") head(all_files) ## [1] "ccms_parameters/params.xml"                       ## [2] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample1.mzXML"  ## [3] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample10.mzXML" ## [4] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample11.mzXML" ## [5] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample12.mzXML" ## [6] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample13.mzXML" massive_ftp_path("MSV000080547", mustWork = FALSE) ## [1] "ftp://massive-ftp.ucsd.edu/v01/MSV000080547/" library(Spectra)  #' Load MS data files of one data set s <- Spectra("MSV000080547", filePattern = "1.mzML$",              source = MsBackendMassIVE()) s ## MSn data (Spectra) with 4322 spectra in a MsBackendMassIVE backend: ##        msLevel     rtime scanIndex ##      <integer> <numeric> <integer> ## 1            1     0.497         1 ## 2            1     0.829         2 ## 3            1     1.159         3 ## 4            1     1.488         4 ## 5            1     1.818         5 ## ...        ...       ...       ... ## 4318         1   718.439      2157 ## 4319         1   718.769      2158 ## 4320         1   719.099      2159 ## 4321         1   719.429      2160 ## 4322         1   719.759      2161 ##  ... 36 more variables/columns. ##  ## file(s): ## AG_spiked_sample1.mzML ## AG_spiked_sample11.mzML spectraVariables(s) ##  [1] "msLevel"                  "rtime"                    ##  [3] "acquisitionNum"           "scanIndex"                ##  [5] "dataStorage"              "dataOrigin"               ##  [7] "centroided"               "smoothed"                 ##  [9] "polarity"                 "precScanNum"              ## [11] "precursorMz"              "precursorIntensity"       ## [13] "precursorCharge"          "collisionEnergy"          ## [15] "isolationWindowLowerMz"   "isolationWindowTargetMz"  ## [17] "isolationWindowUpperMz"   "peaksCount"               ## [19] "totIonCurrent"            "basePeakMZ"               ## [21] "basePeakIntensity"        "electronBeamEnergy"       ## [23] "ionisationEnergy"         "lowMZ"                    ## [25] "highMZ"                   "mergedScan"               ## [27] "mergedResultScanNum"      "mergedResultStartScanNum" ## [29] "mergedResultEndScanNum"   "injectionTime"            ## [31] "filterString"             "spectrumId"               ## [33] "ionMobilityDriftTime"     "scanWindowLowerLimit"     ## [35] "scanWindowUpperLimit"     "massive_id"               ## [37] "data_file" spectraData(s, c("massive_id", "data_file")) ## DataFrame with 4322 rows and 2 columns ##        massive_id              data_file ##       <character>            <character> ## 1    MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment.. ## 2    MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment.. ## 3    MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment.. ## 4    MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment.. ## 5    MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment.. ## ...           ...                    ... ## 4318 MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment.. ## 4319 MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment.. ## 4320 MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment.. ## 4321 MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment.. ## 4322 MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment.. massive_sync(s@backend) ## MsBackendMassIVE with 4322 spectra ##        msLevel     rtime scanIndex ##      <integer> <numeric> <integer> ## 1            1     0.497         1 ## 2            1     0.829         2 ## 3            1     1.159         3 ## 4            1     1.488         4 ## 5            1     1.818         5 ## ...        ...       ...       ... ## 4318         1   718.439      2157 ## 4319         1   718.769      2158 ## 4320         1   719.099      2159 ## 4321         1   719.429      2160 ## 4322         1   719.759      2161 ##  ... 36 more variables/columns. ##  ## file(s): ## AG_spiked_sample1.mzML ## AG_spiked_sample11.mzML res <- massive_sync_data_files("MSV000080547",                                fileName = "AG_spiked_sample11.mzML") res ##     rid   massive_id                                        data_file ## 1 BFC12 MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample11.mzML ##                                                         rpath ## 1 /github/home/.cache/R/BiocFileCache/AG_spiked_sample11.mzML massive_cached_data_files() ##     rid   massive_id                                        data_file ## 3 BFC12 MSV000080547 peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample11.mzML ##                                                         rpath ## 3 /github/home/.cache/R/BiocFileCache/AG_spiked_sample11.mzML

what: Utility functions for the MassIVE repository — MassIVE-utils
title: Utility functions for the MassIVE repository — MassIVE-utils
text: MassIVE (Mass Spectrometry Interactive Virtual Environment) community resource developed NIH-funded Center Computational Mass Spectrometry promote global, free exchange mass spectrometry data. MassIVE supports deposition proteomics metabolomics experiments, full member ProteomeXchange consortium, allowing datasets assigned ProteomeXchange accessions satisfy publication requirements. Submitted data can include raw mass spectrometry files, identification results, quantification data. repository also provides online workflows reanalysis public datasets tools comparison identification results across datasets. experiment MassIVE identified unique identifier, starting MSV followed number. data (raw MS files, metadata, result files) dataset available public download online browsing dataset made public submitter. functions listed allow query retrieve information data set/experiment MassIVE. massive_ftp_path(): returns FTP path provided MassIVE ID. MassIVE ID exist function throws error. mustWork = TRUE (default) function throws error either data set exist GNPS2 DB (mzML/CDF/mzXML files available) internet connection available. function returns character(1) FTP path data set folder. massive_cached_data_files(): lists locally cached data files MassIVE. Since function evaluates local content require internet connection. default parameters available data files listed. parameters can used restrict lookup. massive_list_files(): returns available files (directories) specified MassIVE data set (.e., FTP directory content data set). function returns character vector relative file names absolute FTP path (massive_ftp_path()) data set. Parameter pattern allows filter file names define file names returned. massive_sync_data_files(): synchronize data files specified MassIVE data set eventually downloading locally caching . Parameter fileName allows specify names selected data files sync. massive_download_file(): download files MassIVE repository specified MassIVE dataset. Use pattern filter files name using regular expression (downloads files default). Use fileName specify one exact file names download. Use path set destination directory downloaded files. massive_param_file(): download parse params.xml files data set. function return data.frame list data.frame 2 columns (Parameter Name, Value). Use fileName parse additional xml files data.set. massive_delete_cache(): removes local content MassIVE data set ID massiveId. delete eventually present locally cached data files specified data set. change data eventually present local BiocFileCache.

title: Utility functions for the MassIVE repository — MassIVE-utils
code: massive_ftp_path(x = character(), mustWork = TRUE)  massive_list_files(x = character(), pattern = NULL)  massive_download_file(   massiveId = character(),   pattern = "*",   fileName = character(),   path = "./",   overwrite = FALSE )  massive_param_file(massiveId = character(), fileName = "params.xml")  massive_sync_data_files(   massiveId = character(),   pattern = "mzML$|CDF$|cdf$|mzXML$",   fileName = character() )  massive_cached_data_files(   massiveId = character(),   pattern = "*",   fileName = character() )  massive_delete_cache(massiveId = character())

title: Utility functions for the MassIVE repository — MassIVE-utils
text: x character(1) ID MassIVE data set (usually starting MSV followed number). mustWork massive_ftp_path(): logical(1) whether validity path verified . default (mustWork = TRUE) function throws error either data set exist folder can accessed (e.g. internet connection available). pattern massive_list_files(), massive_sync_data_files() massive_cached_data_files(): character(1) defining pattern filter file names, pattern = "mzML$" retrieve file names files data set (.e., files extension "mzML"). parameter passed grepl() function. massiveId character(1) ID single MassIVE data set/experiment. fileName massive_sync_data_files() massive_cached_data_files(): optional character defining names specific data files data set downloaded cached. path massive_download_file(): optional character defining directory download files. overwrite massive_download_file(): logical(1) whether existing files overwritten. Defaults FALSE, case files already exist path skipped.

title: Utility functions for the MassIVE repository — MassIVE-utils
text: massive_ftp_path(): character(1) ftp path specified data set MassIVE ftp server. massive_list_files(): character names files data set's base ftp directory. massive_sync_data_files() massive_cached_data_files(): data.frame MassIVE ID, name(s) remote local file names synchronized data files.

title: Utility functions for the MassIVE repository — MassIVE-utils
text: Data retrieval follows three main steps. First, package queries GNPS2 DB list files provided massiveId, filtering filePattern retain formats supported MsBackendMzR (mzML, CDF, mzXML). Second, FTP link retrieved MassIVE. requested files ccms_peak folder, FTP link updated changing volume project-specific one volume z01, contains ccms_peak folder projects. file downloaded MassIVE FTP server cached locally. Files already present cache re-downloaded. Third, cached local paths passed Spectra::MsBackendMzR() read index spectral data. Two additional per-spectrum variables populated: "massive_id" "data_file". offline = TRUE, remote query skipped previously cached content used.

title: Utility functions for the MassIVE repository — MassIVE-utils
text: Johannes Rainer, Philippine Louail, Gabriele Tomè

what: MsBackend representing MS data from MassIVE — MsBackendMassIVE
title: MsBackend representing MS data from MassIVE — MsBackendMassIVE
text: MsBackendMassIVE retrieves represents mass spectrometry (MS) data proteomics metabolomics experiments stored MassIVE (Mass Spectrometry Interactive Virtual Environment) repository, community resource developed NIH-funded Center Computational Mass Spectrometry UC San Diego. backend directly extends Spectra::MsBackendMzR backend Spectra package hence supports MS data mzML, netCDF mzXML format. Data formats can loaded MsBackendMassIVE. Upon initialization backendInitialize() method, MsBackendMassIVE backend downloads caches MS data files dataset locally, avoiding repeated download data. local data cache managed Bioconductor's BiocFileCache package. See help vignettes package details cached data resources. Additional utility functions management cached files also provided MsBackendMassIVE. See help massive_cached_data_files() information.

title: MsBackend representing MS data from MassIVE — MsBackendMassIVE
code: MsBackendMassIVE()  # S4 method for class 'MsBackendMassIVE' backendInitialize(   object,   massiveId = character(),   filePattern = "mzML$|CDF$|cdf$|mzXML$",   offline = FALSE,   ... )  # S4 method for class 'MsBackendMassIVE' backendRequiredSpectraVariables(object, ...)  massive_sync(x, offline = FALSE)

title: MsBackend representing MS data from MassIVE — MsBackendMassIVE
text: object instance MsBackendMassIVE. massiveId character(1) ID single MassIVE data set/experiment. filePattern character pattern defining supported (requested) file types. Defaults filePattern = "mzML$|CDF$|cdf$|mzXML$" hence restricting mzML, CDF mzXML files supported Spectra's MsBackendMzR backend. offline logical(1) whether locally cached content evaluated/loaded. ... additional parameters; currently ignored. x instance MsBackendMassIVE.

title: MsBackend representing MS data from MassIVE — MsBackendMassIVE
text: MsBackendMassIVE(): instance MsBackendMassIVE. backendInitialize(): instance MsBackendMassIVE MS data specified MassIVE data set. backendRequiredSpectraVariables(): character spectra variables needed backend provide MS data. massive_sync(): input MsBackendMassIVE paths locally cached data files eventually updated.

title: MsBackend representing MS data from MassIVE — MsBackendMassIVE
text: File names data files default extracted column "filepath" GNPS2 database. backend uses BiocFileCache package caching data files. stored default local BiocFileCache cache along additional metadata includes MassIVE ID. Note present MS data files mzML, CDF mzXML format supported. MsBackendMassIVE backend defines provides additional spectra variables "massive_id" "data_file" list MassIVE ID, original data file name MassIVE ftp server individual spectrum. "data_file" can used mapping experiment's samples individual data files, respective spectra. MsBackendMassIVE backend considered read-thus support changing m/z intensity values directly.

title: MsBackend representing MS data from MassIVE — MsBackendMassIVE
text: account high server load eventually failing rejected downloads MassIVE FTP server (ftp://massive-ftp.ucsd.edu/), download functions repeatedly retry download file. error thrown download fails 5 consecutive attempts. attempt, function waits increasing time period (5 seconds first second 10 seconds 2nd 3rd attempt). time period can also configured "massive.sleep_mult" option, defines sleep time multiplicator (defaults 5).

title: MsBackend representing MS data from MassIVE — MsBackendMassIVE
text: New instances class can created MsBackendMassIVE() function. Data loaded initialized using backendInitialize() function can configured parameters massiveId filePattern. massiveId must ID single (existing) MassIVE dataset (e.g. "MSV000079514"). Optional parameter filePattern defines pattern used filter file names MS data files. defaults data files file endings supported MS data formats. backendInitialize() requires active internet connection function first compares remote file content locally cached files eventually synchronizes changes/updates. can skipped offline = TRUE case locally cached content queried. backendRequiredSpectraVariables() function returns names spectra variables required backend provide MS data. massive_sync() function can used synchronize local data cache ensure data files locally available. function check local cache eventually download missing data files MassIVE repository.

title: MsBackend representing MS data from MassIVE — MsBackendMassIVE
text: Gabriele Tomè, Philippine Louail, Johannes Rainer

title: MsBackend representing MS data from MassIVE — MsBackendMassIVE
code: library(MsBackendMassIVE)  ## List files of a MassIVE data set massive_list_files("MSV000080547") #>  [1] "ccms_parameters/params.xml"                       #>  [2] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample1.mzXML"  #>  [3] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample10.mzXML" #>  [4] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample11.mzXML" #>  [5] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample18.mzXML" #> [12] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample19.mzXML" #> [13] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample2.mzXML"  #> [14] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample8.mzXML"  #> [21] "peak/Quant_assesment_QE/AG_spiked_sample9.mzXML"  #> [22] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample1.mzML"  #> [23] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample10.mzML" #> [24] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample11.mzML" #> [25] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample12.mzML" #> [26] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample16.mzML" #> [30] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample17.mzML" #> [31] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample18.mzML" #> [32] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample19.mzML" #> [33] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample2.mzML"  #> [34] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample20.mzML" #> [35] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample3.mzML"  #> [36] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample4.mzML"  #> [37] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample5.mzML"  #> [38] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample6.mzML"  #> [39] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample7.mzML"  #> [40] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample8.mzML"  #> [41] "peak/Quant_assesment_QQQ/AG_spiked_sample9.mzML"   ## Initialize a MsBackendMassIVE representing all MS data files of ## the data set with the ID "MSV000080547". This will download and cache all ## files and subsequently load and represent them in R.  be <- backendInitialize(MsBackendMassIVE(), "MSV000080547",                         filePattern = "1.mzML$") be #> MsBackendMassIVE with 4322 spectra #>        msLevel     rtime scanIndex #>      <integer> <numeric> <integer> #> 1            1     0.497         1 #> 2            1     0.829         2 #> 3            1     1.159         3 #> 4            1     1.488         4 #> 5            1     1.818         5 #> ...        ...       ...       ... #> 4318         1   718.439      2157 #> 4319         1   718.769      2158 #> 4320         1   719.099      2159 #> 4321         1   719.429      2160 #> 4322         1   719.759      2161 #>  ... 36 more variables/columns. #>  #> file(s): #> AG_spiked_sample1.mzML #> AG_spiked_sample11.mzML  ## The `massive_sync()` function can be used to ensure that all data files ## are available locally. This function will eventually download missing data ## files or update their paths. be <- massive_sync(be)

title: Retry expression on failure — retry
text: retry() retries, upon failure, evaluation expression exp ntimes times waiting increasing amount time tries, .e., waiting Sys.sleep(* sleep_mult) seconds try . expr fails ntimes times error thrown.

title: Retry expression on failure — retry
Retry expression on failure — retry
text: expr Expression evaluated. ntimes integer(1) number times try. sleep_mult numeric(1) multiplier define increasing waiting time (seconds).

title: Retry expression on failure — retry
text: Warnings suppressed.

title: MsBackendMassIVE 0.1.2
text: Add massive_param_file() parse params.xml file. Add additional test massive_list_files() .massive_data_files()

title: MsBackendMassIVE 0.1.1
text: Add package vignette. Replace interactive readline() overwrite parameter massive_download_file(). Replace cat() message() massive_download_file().

title: MsBackendMassIVE 0.1.0
text: Add MassIVE utilities. Add functionality download cache MS data files MassIVE. Add unit tests.
